title: rubus × flavidus
intro: Rubus × flavidus, also known as the yellow raspberry or yellow raspberry blackberry, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Rubus genus and is a cross between Rubus fruticosus and Rubus idaeus. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × flavidus include its potential to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, improve cognitive function, and support immune system health. Rubus × flavidus can be prepared as a herbal remedy through teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully explore its potential medicinal applications.
